title: xyris celiae
intro: Xyris celiae, also known as the Celia's Yellow Eyeberry, is a flowering plant species within the Xyris genus, characterized by its vibrant yellow flowers and edible berries. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Xyris celiae include its potential to alleviate digestive problems, reduce fever, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots can be used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat respiratory issues and skin conditions.
